message:
fix(ci): suppress collection_is_never_read clippy lint in feature test

When compiled with --no-default-features, the features vector in
test_feature_flags_detection was flagged as never read because the
only assert reading it was gated behind #[cfg(feature = "self_update")].
Add a complementary #[cfg(not(...))] assertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
